name: meok-eu-code-of-practice-mcp — CARE-MEMBRANE FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions about CARE-MEMBRANE on meok-eu-code-of-practice-mcp

acceptedAnswer.text: A 4-dimension ethics framework for AI in care: Sustainability, Balance, Compassion, Agency.
Care 0.95+ is the minimum acceptable score across all 4 dimensions.
Any AI system used in health, social care, or elder care settings.
